meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't deploy apps. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve Deployment Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployment. Use this advanced SaaS starter kit guide with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship production-ready apps faster as a freelancer.
content.answer_block: Deployment friction kills freelance profitability. By utilizing a pre-configured SaaS starter kit, you eliminate infrastructure boilerplate and environment drift. Combining this with Antigravity for architecture and Claude Code for automated execution allows you to ship production-ready, scalable applications in hours rather than weeks, ensuring a consistent, high-margin delivery pipeline.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, the client is restless, and your codebase—perfectly functional on your local machine—is throwing a cryptic 502 error in production. You aren't just fighting code; you're fighting the invisible friction of deployment, a silent killer that eats into your billable hours and stains your reputation as a high-velocity engineer.

You deserve a system that works as hard as you do. By shifting from manual configuration to a battle-tested SaaS starter kit architecture, you reclaim your technical sovereignty. This guide isn't about teaching you to code; it's about teaching you to ship with the precision of a lead architect, utilizing the synergy of Antigravity and Claude Code to automate the path from repo to revenue.

steps.title: Bootstrap Architecture with Antigravity
steps.description: Establish a production-grade foundation. Antigravity handles the complex scaffolding so you can focus on business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready SaaS starter kit structure using Next.js 15, TypeScript, and Tailwind. Include authentication via Clerk, database schema with Prisma, and a robust CI/CD pipeline configuration for Vercel.

steps.title: Automate Database Migrations
steps.description: Eliminate manual SQL execution errors by codifying your database lifecycle within the starter kit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Prisma migration scripts that handle automated schema updates during the CI/CD build process without downtime.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npx prisma migrate dev --name init'

steps.title: Configure Environment Security
steps.description: Stop hardcoding secrets. Implement a secure, automated environment variable injection strategy.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a secure environment variable management system that integrates with Vercel secrets and local .env.example templates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npx dotenv-cli -e .env.local -- npm run build'

steps.title: Implement Automated Health Checks
steps.description: Ensure your production deployments are stable with automated smoke tests before traffic hits the site.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add a Playwright test suite to the CI pipeline that validates critical user flows like sign-up and payment processing post-deployment.

steps.title: Deploy to Production with Confidence
steps.description: Execute the final push to production using the validated pipeline established in the previous steps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment instruction set for Vercel that includes automated rollbacks if health checks fail.

pro_tips: Always use a 'feature-flag' strategy in your starter kit to toggle new deployments without exposing incomplete UI to live users.
Implement database 'soft-deletes' by default to save clients from accidental data loss disasters.
Use Claude Code to periodically audit your dependencies for security vulnerabilities every time you deploy.
Standardize your logging framework across all client projects to enable cross-project monitoring from one dashboard.
Include a 'maintenance mode' component in your kit that can be toggled via a single environment variable for emergency fixes.
content.next_steps: Once your first deployment is live, use the same starter kit to build a modular 'Add-on Library' for your freelance business, allowing you to drag-and-drop features like Stripe billing or AI chat widgets into future client projects.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to stop fighting infrastructure and start scaling your freelance revenue. Stop manually configuring environments and start shipping at enterprise velocity. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
